log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Gnome — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:7+3=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 2/3 targets affected.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Gnome — Bardic Musician with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).

Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.

→ Gnome — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 6 vs DC 10]
